title: Ragex's Nuclear Tech
description: A sci-fi chemistry learning tool about space, science, immersion and of course Nuclear Tech.
body:
# Ragex's Nuclear Tech Mod

**Ragex's Nuclear Tech Mod (RNTM)** is a Minecraft Forge 1.7.10 fork of HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod focused on realistic nuclear technology, industrial chemistry, radiation hazards, resource extraction, and large-scale engineering.

Rather than expanding the original mod with increasingly fantastical content, RNTM aims to ground gameplay in real-world concepts, plausible engineering, and science-fiction that feels believable. Reactors, fuel cycles, isotopes, fallout, industrial processing, space infrastructure, and environmental hazards form the core of the experience.

Whether you're building a nuclear industry, operating large chemical plants, managing contamination, extracting strategic resources, or running a multiplayer war server, RNTM provides a deeper and more realistic take on the Nuclear Tech experience.

## Major Features

### ☢ Nuclear Technology

* Multiple reactor types including Molten Salt Reactors (MSRs), Pebble Bed Reactors (PBRs), research reactors, and advanced fuel systems.
* Expanded radiation mechanics, fallout, contamination, treatment, and hazard management.
* Nuclear waste handling, meltdowns, reactor accidents, and environmental consequences.

### 🧪 Industrial Chemistry

* Extensive chemical production chains and industrial processing.
* Expanded isotope separation and enrichment systems.
* Distillation, acids, fuels, gases, and advanced material production.
* Greater emphasis on real-world chemistry and industrial infrastructure.

### ⛏ Resources & Industry

* Expanded metallurgy and ore processing.
* Bedrock resource extraction and large-scale mining infrastructure.
* Blast furnace-centered progression and industrial manufacturing.
* Oil, fuels, fluids, and resource logistics.

### 🚀 Space & Infrastructure

* Reworked planets and celestial bodies.
* Gas giants, solar exploration, satellites, and orbital infrastructure.
* Improved orbital calculations and space-related systems.
* Expanded long-term technological progression.

### ⚔ Warfare & Hazards

* Missiles, explosives, CIWS systems, and strategic weapons.
* Radiation hotspots, fallout events, and environmental damage.
* Administrative controls for nuclear warfare on multiplayer servers.
* Improved support for large-scale server conflict and faction-based gameplay.

### ⚙ Server & Pack Maker Friendly

* Extensive configuration options.
* JSON-based customization systems.
* Recipe and machine overrides.
* Optional control over radiation, world generation, dimensions, weapons, and other major gameplay systems.

## Built for Minecraft 1.7.10

RNTM is developed exclusively for Minecraft Forge 1.7.10 and includes ongoing compatibility improvements for popular legacy modpacks and server environments, including Angelica, GTNH NEI variants, OpenComputers integrations, and other community-maintained ecosystem projects.

If you enjoy large-scale engineering, nuclear technology, industrial chemistry, realistic hazards, and long-term technological progression, Ragex's Nuclear Tech Mod offers one of the most extensive industrial experiences available for Minecraft 1.7.10.
